title: <div>The Exploration Graph (Minimap): A small, persistent minimap in the corner
content:
The Exploration Graph (Minimap): A small, persistent minimap in the corner would visualize your entire session as a node-based graph. Each node is a topic, and each edge is a click. Different colors could represent different Prisms. This allows you to see the entire shape of your journey, zoom out, and instantly jump back to any previous point in your exploration across any instance.
A User Scenario in "The Polycosm"
A user starts with the word "Dream" in the default Oracle Prism. It provides a psychological and neurological definition. The ASCII art is a simple, abstract representation of brainwaves.
Intrigued, they click the "Branch" button next to the Prism selector, creating a new column. They set this new instance to the Poet Prism. The definition of "Dream" becomes a short prose poem about "the soul's nightly theater." The ASCII art morphs into something more whimsical and surreal.
In the Poet's definition, they click the word "soul." It continues in the second column, now defining "soul" in poetic terms.
They jump back to the Oracle column and click on "neurological." This continues the exploration in the first column, drilling down into the science.
